description: This Kotlin source file defines the ApiClient class, which manages HTTP API requests with integrated authentication token handling, request retrying upon authorization failure, and logging. It uses OkHttp and Retrofit for network operations and includes an Interceptor for adding authorization headers and refreshing tokens when needed.

classes.name: ApiClient
classes.description: A client class for managing API interactions with token-based authentication and automated token refresh upon 401 responses.

methods.name: ApiClient
methods.description: Constructor initializing the ApiClient with an AuthManager instance.
